chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No.9 of 2020 Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing (Priority) Case 1. For order on CMA No. 736/2024 (U/A) 2. For order on CMA No. 737/2024 (Withdrawal of Appeal) 3. for order on office objection 4. For hearing of Main Case 5. For hearing of CMA No. 59/2020 Dated 27.03.2024 Mr. Asadullah Bullo Advocate for the Appellant.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. On instructions Mr. Asadullah Bullo does not press this appeal, which is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
